description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular silhouette and clean lines. The front face is equipped with three spacious drawers, each fitted with small, round black knobs for easy access. The top and sides are finished in a dark wood tone, providing a striking contrast to the lighter-colored drawer fronts. The legs are slightly tapered, giving the piece a subtle elegance and stability. The construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with a smooth, matte finish. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies, offering both storage and a stylish accent.
description: A modern chest of drawers with three drawers, dark wood sides and top, and light-colored drawer fronts with black knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three light-colored drawers with black knobs and dark wood frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid dark wood panel and the depth of the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, dark wood back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid dark wood panel.
